title: DecisionSynthesis
description: Aggregated decision after combining multiple agents' recommendations.

decision.description: One-sentence final answer. Must be one of the constrained options if the question supplied any.

rationale.description: Three to six sentences synthesizing the strongest arguments from the supporting agents. Do not just say 'most agents agreed'.

agreed.description: Number of agents whose recommendation aligns with the decision (after merging close paraphrases).

total.description: Total number of agents who returned a usable recommendation.

confidence.description: low when agents are split or when many flagged low confidence. medium when a clear majority forms but with real dissent. high when agents converge with mutually-reinforcing reasoning.

position.description: The minority recommendation in one sentence.

rationale.description: What the minority's reasoning is. Two to three sentences.

minorityPositions.description: Notable disagreement worth surfacing. Empty if there was none.

uncertainties.description: Specific factual or contextual gaps that, if resolved, might change the decision. Empty if none.
